name: proc_creation_win_susp_always_install_elevated_windows_installer
raw_query: any where (((process.executable:"*\\Windows\\Installer\\*" and process.executable:"*msi*") and process.executable:"*tmp") or (process.executable:"*\\msiexec.exe" and (winlog.event_data.IntegrityLevel like~ ("System", "S-1-16-16384")))) and (user.name like~ ("*AUTHORI*", "*AUTORI*")) and (not (process.parent.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\services.exe" or (process.command_line:"*\\system32\\msiexec.exe /V" or process.parent.command_line:"*\\system32\\msiexec.exe /V") or process.parent.executable:"C:\\ProgramData\\Sophos\\*" or process.parent.executable:"C:\\ProgramData\\Avira\\*" or (process.parent.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Avast Software\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avast Software\\*")) or (process.parent.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Update\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Update\\*"))))
